channel.title: login on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in login on IT notes

item.title: fdesetup
item.description: To remove a user from the login screen when booting and login from the first time: sudo fdesetup remove -user monkey The user will not be listed any more in the login screen, but you will need first logging with a user that can decrypt the disk and then switch to your user. Note this will not delete or remove the user account
